content.speakerText: Thanks so much for today, Lisa! You made it so fun and easy!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你今天的一切，丽莎！你让旅程太轻松有趣了！

options.text: You're welcome! I hope you had a great time!
Maybe next time I'll be better.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! I hope you had a great time!' 是对感谢的自然、积极回应，符合服务场景的礼貌与热情。干扰项 'That's fine, no problem.' 语气过于平淡，缺乏情感回应；'I didn't do much, honestly.' 降低自身价值，不符合服务行业积极反馈原则；'Maybe next time I'll be better.' 暗示本次服务不佳，与游客的正面评价矛盾。

content.speakerText: If you loved the tour, I'd really appreciate a 5-star rating on the app!
content.speakerTextCn: 如果喜欢今天的行程，麻烦在App上给个五星好评吧！

options.text: I'll leave a 5-star review right away!
I don't use apps much, so I won't rate you.
I didn't like the tour, so I won't rate it.
Can I give you a 3-star instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I'll leave a 5-star review right away!' 是积极、配合的回应，符合导游期待。干扰项 'I don't use apps much, so I won't rate you.' 直接拒绝，缺乏礼貌；'I didn't like the tour...' 与前提 'if you loved the tour' 矛盾；'Can I give you a 3-star instead?' 暗示不满，破坏服务氛围。

content.speakerText: I really enjoyed the trip and want to thank you for all your hard work.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受这次旅行，想感谢你付出的辛勤努力。

options.text: Thank you for saying that! It means a lot to me.
Oh, it was just my job.
I hope you didn't spend too much money.
Maybe next time you can be more quiet.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thank you for saying that! It means a lot to me.' 是真诚、情感丰富的回应，体现职业素养���干扰项 'Oh, it was just my job.' 将服务贬低为机械任务，削弱情感连接；'I hope you didn't spend too much money.' 无关且可能引发误解；'Maybe next time you can be more quiet.' 是负面评价，完全不合语境。

content.template: Thanks for everything! You made the trip so ___ and enjoyable!
content.hint: 游客常用来形容轻松愉快旅程的形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 形容词搭配（fun and enjoyable，旅行场景高频表达）

content.template: I'd really appreciate it if you could leave a ___-star rating on the app.
content.hint: 导游通常请求的评价等级
content.knowledgePoint: 数字与评价等级搭配（5-star rating，服务场景核心表达）

content.template: It was my ___! Don't forget to leave a review!
content.hint: 表达‘我很开心为你服务’的固定句型
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（It was my pleasure，道别感谢场景核心句型）

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for today, Lisa! You made it so fun and easy!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你今天的一切，丽莎！你让旅程太轻松有趣了！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! Hope you come back next time!
It was my pleasure! Thank you for being such a great group!
No worries at all—I'm glad you enjoyed it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并传递积极情感
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'welcome', 'pleasure', 'enjoyed' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: If you loved the tour, I'd really appreciate a 5-star rating on the app!
content.speakerTextCn: 如果喜欢今天的行程，麻烦在App上给个五星好评吧！
expectedAnswers: Definitely! I'll rate you right now!
Sure thing—I'll leave a 5-star review after I get home.
I'll do my best to rate you, even though I'm not great with apps.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了评分请求，即使有困难也表达意愿
语言准确性：正确使用 'rate', 'review', 'app' 等关键词
表达自然度：语气真诚、不生硬，符合口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'definitely', 'sure thing', 'rate', 'review' 等场景表达

content.speakerText: I really had an amazing time on this tour. Thank you for everything!
content.speakerTextCn: 我在这次旅行中度过了非常棒的时光，感谢你所做的一切！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I'm thrilled you enjoyed it!
That means a lot to me—I work hard to make every trip special.
You're very welcome! I hope you'll share your experience with others!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并强化积极体验
语言准确性：语法正确，无中式结构，使用自然口语表达
表达自然度：语气温暖、有感染力，符合服务行业语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thrilled', 'means a lot', 'share your experience' 等高阶表达
